item.name: Magitek Helldiver F1
item.description:
Minimal firepower, maximum attitude.

Use item to acquire the magitek helldiver F1 minion.
item.tooltip:
Did that man just bring down
flying armor with a single stroke
<Emphasis>in midair</Emphasis>?
   - Aymeric
item.specialactiondescription: Delivers 10% damage to the nearest enemy Arcana Stone.
